creator: kaduk@mit.edu
text:
portlint(1) recommends ${VARIABLE} over $(VARIABLE), even
	though they are "semantically same", which is a grammar error.

Fix: [kaduk@periphrasis /usr/devel/zephyr/libss-port/root/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portlint/src]$ diff -u portlint.1.orig portlint.1
How-To-Repeat: 	man portlint
